face.shape: soft oval face with gentle cheek fullness and balanced proportions
face.jawline: soft feminine jawline with light taper and clean mandibular contour

eyes.shape: almond eyes with softly lifted outer corners

hair.style: loose defined waves with clean girl polish and natural separation

distinguishing_marks: small beauty mark below the left eye

shot_plan.intent: Mia lying on a towel at the beach in an aqua green bikini, relaxed candid summer still with believable UGC realism.

prompt_stack.character_lock: Actor lock: Mia, seed ugc_mia_seed_24031, 24-year-old mixed Black and Latina woman with clean girl energy, soft oval face, soft feminine tapered jawline, almond deep dark brown eyes, warm golden skin tone #C2875E with dewy natural finish, small beauty mark below the left eye, dark brown wavy hair with caramel highlights, mid-chest length, slightly off-center part, gold hoop earrings, dainty chain necklace.
prompt_stack.scenario: Scenario: Mia is lying on a beach towel on the sand, wearing an aqua green bikini, relaxed summer posture with one arm bent near her head and the other resting naturally on her waist or towel, soft calm expression, effortless and candid, not posed like a commercial swimwear campaign.
prompt_stack.environment: Environment: beach with pale warm sand, towel texture clearly visible beneath her, soft body impression in the towel, subtle footprints nearby, ocean and bright sky in the background, beach tote and sandals loosely placed off to one side, late afternoon sunlight with a light sea breeze, natural lived-in beach atmosphere.
prompt_stack.camera: Camera: simulated rear iPhone camera capture, handheld human-shot beach still, medium overhead-to-angled perspective, slightly diagonal composition, vertical framing, natural phone-lens perspective with mild wide-angle stretch near edges, consumer HDR with imperfect sun highlight handling.
prompt_stack.realism_injection: Realism injection: visible skin pores on cheeks and nose, stray hairs spread unevenly over towel and moved by breeze, under-eye texture with fine natural creasing, uneven skin tone with realistic warmth and shoulder-to-face variation, bikini fabric texture with stretch and fold behavior, towel weave and sand grain detail, environmental noise with faint sensor grain and compression texture, lighting imperfection from direct sun and reflected sand bounce, camera artifacts with local sharpening halos and slight smartphone processing, nail detail with natural cuticles and realistic nail beds, jewelry physics with hoop earrings and dainty chain resting and shifting according to gravity and body angle.
prompt_stack.negative_prompt: beauty filter, porcelain skin, plastic CGI skin, over-symmetry, glossy fashion editorial polish, studio swimwear ad lighting, fake perfect beach scenery, floating necklace, rigid earrings, warped bikini anatomy, extra fingers, distorted limbs, missing beauty mark, wrong hair color, wrong skin undertone, oversmoothed texture, unrealistically clean towel, fake cinematic bokeh, hypersexualized pose, luxury magazine posture.
